title: Grossularia lobbii
taxonomy: Grossularia lobbii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It belongs to the genus Grossularia, which is commonly known as the currant genus. Grossularia lobbii is further classified within the subfamily Rosoideae, a group of flowering plants that also includes roses and strawberries. This species is native to the mountainous regions of China and is closely related to other currant species. Grossularia lobbii is a woody shrub with edible fruits, similar to those found in other Grossularia species.
